hero.subtitle: About Us
hero.description: At Krauss Machinery we work with a clear focus: providing reliable solutions in industrial and construction machinery that boost our clients' productivity.

about_section.title: WHO WE ARE
about_section.paragraph1: We are a company specialized in the commercialization of industrial and construction machinery, focused on providing high-quality equipment, technical advice, and solutions tailored to the operational needs of each client.
about_section.paragraph2: Our commitment is to support our clients from equipment selection to operation, ensuring reliability, technical support, and a long-term business relationship.

items.title: COMMITMENT
items.text: We support our clients at every stage of the process with personalized attention.

items.title: QUALITY
items.text: We work only with equipment that meets high standards of performance and safety.

items.title: TRUST
items.text: We build strong relationships based on transparency and results.
